MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Acuna of Brayton Purcell (898.1555) for plaintiff and responding party
Sabrina Axt of Foley & Mansfield (510.590.9500) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT D.W. NICHOLSON CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is granted. Defendant shifted the burden of proof based on factually devoid discovery. Given the Court's ruling on the Robbins' declaration, plaintiff fails to present admissible evidence that creates triable issue of fact. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION To Strike The Decl Of Gordon Robbins And To Exclude Testimony Of Gordon Robbins
Off Calendar Aug-12-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne Acuna of Brayton Purcell (898.1555) for plaintiff and responding party
Sabrina Axt of Foley & Mansfield (510.590.9500) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT D.W. NICHOLSON CORPORATION'S MOTION TO STRIKE THE DECLARATION OF GORDON ROBBINS AND TO EXCLUDE TESTIMONY OF GORDON ROBBINS is granted. The declaration contradicts Robbins' deposition testimony. D'Amico v. Board of Medical Examiners (1974) 11 Cal. 3d. 1, 21. Plaintiff has failed to explain why Robbins did not appear at his noticed deposition. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/AY) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

Off Calendar Jul-18-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT LAMONS METAL GASKET COMPANY MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT

Appearances:
Jeffrey Wehr of Brayton Purcell (898-1555) for plaintiff and responding party
Robert Bugatto of Vasquez Estrada & Dumont (453-0555) for defendant and moving party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied, failed to shift the burden of proof. In moving for summary judgment, defendant relies on the testimony of Lever in other cases, which is not admissible against plaintiff and on the Owen declaration which fails to attach two exhibits upon which Owen's testimony is based. Plaintiff's objections L 1, N 4-8 are sustained; the remainder are overruled. Order signed in open Court. (302/PJM/PJM) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
